name: Meatless Sunday Roast
recipeIngredient: 4 tablespoons Soy sauce or veg extract
recipeInstructions:
1. Start preparing the roast the day before it's needed.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
3. Grease and flour a large casserole dish or mold.
4. Sprinkle half of the minced garlic over the inside of the dish.
5. In a large mixing bowl, measure the vegetable sausage mix, egg, and 1 pint (500 ml) water. Stir well and let stand for 5 minutes for the liquid to absorb.
6. In a food blender, measure 1/4 pint (125 ml) water and add the vegetable burgers. Blend until even consistency.
7. Mix the TVP® mince with 1 pint (500 ml) water in a bowl. Stir well and let stand for 5 minutes.
8. Combine the sausage mix, pureed burgers, and soaked TVP® mince together in a large bowl. Add the remaining garlic and soy sauce. Mix well.
9. Coat the casserole dish with vegetable oil and pour the mixture into the dish, pressing firmly onto the sides and bottom. Leave a large cavity in the middle of the stuffing.
10. Firm the mixture using the back of a spoon or your knuckles.
11. Bake for 1 hour and 30 minutes in the oven. Allow to cool, then cover and place overnight in the refrigerator.
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Place cubed bread in a large mixing bowl.
3. Melt margarine in a large frying pan. Add celery and onion and sauté for 5 minutes until lightly brown.
4. Pour the saute into the mixing bowl with the bread cubes.
5. Add 1/4 cup (60 ml) water, sage, and mixed herbs. Mix very well.
6. Fill the roast cavity with this stuffing. Any remainder may be placed in the baking dish and baked separately later.
7. Turn the casserole dish upside down on a baking tray or roasting pan without removing the dish. Place in the oven and bake for 45 minutes.
8. Remove the casserole dish and continue baking for another hour.
9. After 30 minutes, place extra stuffing in the oven and bake for an additional 30 minutes.
10. Serve the stuffed roast with hot gravy, extra stuffing, baked sweet potatoes, cranberry sauce, mashed potatoes, etc.
11. Good source of protein, calcium, potassium, iron, zinc.
